race.comment: MAD ABOUT MAGNUS (8) broke through for her maiden win over 1008m at this track last time, well supported and coming clear as the $1.65 favourite. Should take plenty of beating again. DISMANTLE (10) is a four-year-old mare who is having her first run for the Mark Walker yard. Hasn't raced since finishing eighth at Eagle Farm nine weeks ago. Respecting, watch the market. NORDIC STRIKE (2) is back after a break of three-and-a-half months. Looking to emulate his win at Stony Creek at the beginning of last prep and has the figures to do so.  HOLLYWOODBOULEVARD (1) resumes with a nice profile having won two in a row before the break, respecting.
